userStories.story: As a student, I want to create a study plan so that I can organize my learning goals
criteria: Given I am logged in and on the study plan page
When I set my exam date and select courses
Then a personalized study schedule is generated

userStories.story: As a student, I want to view my existing study plan so that I can track my progress
criteria: Given I have an existing study plan
When I navigate to the study plan page
Then I see my schedule and progress

userStories.story: As a student, I want to create a study plan without an exam date so that I can plan self-paced learning
criteria: Given I am on the study plan creation page
When I do not set an exam date
Then the system creates a flexible self-paced schedule
